title: Chat Tabs
description: Adds chat tabs and other useful features to the chat
body:
Chat Tabs adds some features to the chat window that I thought would be useful.

## Features:

### Tabs:
The main feature of this mod.
Chat tabs can be configured to use a regex filter to declutter your chat.
Tabs can also be generated automatically when a player messages you.

### Scroll Bar:
The chat scroll bar can now be clicked and dragged.

### Chat Appearance:
The chat screen can be configured to use a different background color and can be extended to fit even more messages on screen.

### Right Click:
Right clicking in the chat screen will open a menu that allows you to copy chat messages, edit the chat window, and add new tabs.
